violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils tomato slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Tomato slicer must be properly cleaned and sanitized before using. Equipment moved to 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Chips were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen/mop sink area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. -Walk-in cooler fans -Walk-in cooler shelves -Inside of prep unit Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The floor in the kitchen and walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Tomatoes were observed over stacked in the cold hold well. Top tomatoes were observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC removed tomatoes and put in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

Working containers of liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -sides of flat top grill, -kitchen hood vent, -deli display unit, -under prep table, -bread storage containers, -prep unit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
